channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Now in preview: built-in MCP for Azure App Service
item.description: At Build 2026 last week, we announced the public preview of built-in MCP for Azure App Service. It does one thing, and it does it with almost no effort on your part: it turns a REST API you already host on App Service into a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, so AI agents and assistants can call...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: SharePoint and OneDrive Shortcuts in OneLake (Generally Available)
item.description: For most enterprises, the largest and fastest-growing repository of business-critical information is SharePoint and OneDrive. Contracts, financial models, project plans, meeting notes, presentations, and compliance documentation accumulate across every team and department, rich with context that...
item.dc:creator: shiv_narayanan

item.title: The Worm in the Supply Chain: How Defender for Endpoint and Sentinel for SAP BTP Caught Shai-Hulud
item.description: On 29 April 2026, malicious versions of multiple SAP ecosystem npm packages were briefly published, creating a supply-chain exposure for SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) development environments and CI/CD pipelines. For a brief window that morning, affected developers have executed a...
item.dc:creator: MartinPankraz

item.title: Designing Reliable Data Platforms: Centralized Failure Logging Framework with Azure Monitor
item.description: Introduction Modern data platforms are no longer just about moving and transforming data. In production, what really matters is reliability and how quickly you can understand and react when something breaks. If you’re using Azure Synapse/ADF/Microsoft Fabric, you already have built-in monitoring....
item.dc:creator: Sally_Dabbah

item.title: Microsoft Extends Sensitivity Label Block for Connected Services
item.description: The BlockContentAnalysisServices sensitivity label setting blocks access to Microsoft connected services for the content of labeled Office documents. The intention is that users assign sensitivity labels with the block setting to protect an organization’s most sensitive files. Regretfully,...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Getting Secrets Out of YAML: Implementing Azure Key Vault CSI Driver on AKS with Workload Identity
item.description: Table of Contents Why This Pattern Matters The Problem with Secrets in YAML What We Wanted to Achieve Architecture Overview How the Flow Works Implementation Prerequisites Step-by-Step Implementation Understanding the YAML Components Secret Rotation and Reloaders Common Pitfalls and Troubleshooting...
item.dc:creator: anandranjan

item.title: Faster az login: introducing --skip-subscription-discovery and targeted --subscription
item.description: TL;DR — If you belong to many tenants, or a tenant holds hundreds or thousands of subscriptions, az login can crawl — it tries to enumerate every subscription in every tenant before it returns. Two flags now let you skip that enumeration and make login near-instant: az login --tenant <TENANT_ID>...
item.dc:creator: Alex-wdy

item.title: Build 26300 Activation fail..
item.description: After I Upgrade to 26300 from Broken Foced Update 26200, Begging of April 2026.Struggle with Help of Co-pilot & Gemini, 20 Hrs a Day, Couldn't Fix...I Tried Reinstall 26100 & 26200 from Usb, Format,Cleaned by Co-pilot & Gemini Min 40+ Times,Cannot Fix., I Upgraded to 26300,Problem Still Exist but...
item.dc:creator: wisejayc

item.title: problemes selection windows insider previews canary
item.description: bonjourje suis sous Windows insider sous Windows 11 64 bits et je n arrive pas a réinstaller Windows insider Canary tout est grise et je n arrive pas dégriser choisir vos paramètres insider pour remettre sur Canarymerci de vos réponses et bon Week end a tous
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHE2030

item.title: Update: You can now control Teams Meeting Recording expiration notification emails
item.description: Hey Teams community, We've heard the feedback. For admins and users managing a high volume of meetings, TMR expiration emails can pile up fast. We've been working on giving you control, and that control is now here. What's new Tenant admins can now use a PowerShell cmdlet to suppress Teams Meeting...
item.dc:creator: Eddie_Harmon

item.title: Govern AI Agents Using Agent Governance Toolkit and Azure Container App Sandboxes
item.description: When you let a model generate code and you actually execute it, you are handing the model a Python REPL on whatever machine runs the agent. That sounds alarmist — right up until a planner (yours, mine, or anyone else's) produces a snippet that reads as harmless on the first pass: # "summarize the...
item.dc:creator: amolravande

item.title: GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex deprecated
item.description: As of today, June 5, 2026, we have deprecated the following models across most GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions). Note… The post GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex deprecated appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: New Capabilities to Observe Agents in Azure Monitor
item.description: Over the last six months, we have been listening to you and building new capabilities to help you observe your agents. You’ve been sharing with us that quality issues are tricky and evaluation is critical, that agent reasoning needs to be understood, that humans must be in the loop to review select...
item.dc:creator: MattMc

item.title: Action required: Kerberos RC4 hardening may affect Azure Files Active Directory Domain Services
item.description: A Windows security hardening change beginning in April 2026 updates default Kerberos encryption behavior and may impact customers using Azure Files with Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS) authentication over SMB. If you created Azure Files shares prior to 2023, or chose RC4 encryption for...
item.dc:creator: grace_kim

item.title: CodeQL 2.25.6 adds Swift 6.3.2 support and improves C# coverage
item.description: CodeQL is the static analysis engine behind GitHub code scanning, which finds and remediates security issues in your code. We’ve recently released CodeQL 2.25.6, which adds Swift 6.3.2 support, completes… The post CodeQL 2.25.6 adds Swift 6.3.2 support and improves C# coverage appeared first on The...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Enterprise-managed plugins in VS Code in public preview
item.description: Last month we launched a public preview with Copilot CLI that allows enterprise administrators the ability to configure and distribute plugins to GitHub Copilot CLI users across their enterprise. VS… The post Enterprise-managed plugins in VS Code in public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft rewards, how am i gonna redeem my rewards
item.description: How am i gonna redeem my rewards in Microsoft rewards if i can't even do phone verification?? It says it's not allowed… Microsoft pls fix this. Thanks
item.dc:creator: Isaiah_Cacho_95

item.title: Enhancements to Device Status API & Logged-In User Email in Endpoint DLP
item.description: 1. The Real‑World Problem Endpoint DLP analyst Faced (What Was Missing Earlier) Before the introduction of the Device Status API enhancements and logged‑in user visibility, Endpoint DLP teams consistently struggled in below discussed areas: Device Visibility Was Fragmented and Manual - Customers...
item.dc:creator: Harysh9

item.title: Extend Microsoft Purview data protection to AWS Bedrock agents for cross-cloud AI governance
item.description: Organizations are moving fast with AI, and many of those AI workloads are not staying in one cloud. A team might use Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Purview for governance and in addition to Microsoft Foundry they may still choose to run an AI agent on AWS Bedrock or on the Google Cloud Platform. The...
item.dc:creator: Inwafula

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Preview Feature Update (26220.8544) Error de instalación: 0xc1900101
item.description: Cuando pide reiniciar para actualizar la instalación de la actualización, sale este menú, entorno de Recuperación de Windows (Windows Recovery Environment - WinRE), por favor guienme a solucionar este error
item.dc:creator: ortizpinedam34

item.title: Ansible + Azure Arc: Use Ansible modules to deploy and manage Azure Arc machine extensions at scale
item.description: We are making Azure Arc extensible and increasing the flexibility of the tooling you can use to operate your machines using Azure’s control plane. We are excited to announce new modules in Ansible Galaxy that make it easier to manage Azure Arc machine extensions at scale. With the latest updates to...
item.dc:creator: alinetran

item.title: Run Global Secure Access with confidence: Introducing the GSA Operations Guide
item.description: In working with customers, I’ve seen the same pattern again and again: deployment gets the attention, but day 2 operations are where teams need the most structure. This guide is meant to make that part easier—with practical guidance teams can use right away. TL;DR: Your day 2 playbook is here...
item.dc:creator: tdetzner

item.title: From query acceleration to cache cooldown: Everything new in Fabric Data Warehouse at Build 2026
item.description: The rise of AI is fundamentally changing what we demand from a data platform. AI agents and copilots are becoming virtual analysts — issuing queries autonomously, at scale, and at speeds that expose every weakness in a slow or rigid platform. Your mission-critical warehouse must now deliver...
item.dc:creator: tinotereshko

item.title: Official Complaint: Broken Mandatory Update & Incompetent Tech Support
item.description: Hello Microsoft Community, I am writing to express my deep frustration with the latest mandatory Windows updates and the shocking incompetence of the tech support agent who handled my case. The update broke my system entirely—breaking the Start Menu, Settings, and messing up my screen reader...
item.dc:creator: QueenOfKeysReema

item.title: Securing CI/CD in an agentic world: Claude Code Github action case
item.description: Microsoft Threat Intelligence identified a prompt injection pathway in Claude Code GitHub Action that allowed access to workflow secrets under specific conditions. This research examines the attack chain, responsible disclosure process, Anthropic's mitigation, and guidance for securing AI-powered...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team, Dor Edry and Amit Eliahu

item.title: NOT ABLE TO UPDATE THIS - Windows 11 Insider Preview Quality Update (26300.8553)
item.description: NOT ABLE TO UPDATE THIS - Windows 11 Insider Preview Quality Update (26300.8553)-THIS ERROR APPEARS-Install error - 0x800736b3
item.dc:creator: CAHARSHAD01

item.title: Microsoft Wants PowerShell Developers to Change How They Download Microsoft Modules
item.description: A Microsoft blog describes some changes for PowerShell developers in terms of installing modules and the role of the Microsoft Artifact Registry (MAR). In a nutshell, Microsoft intends the MAR to be the go-to place to download first-party PowerShell modules and other artifacts. This solves the...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: How can I remove the Windows preview?
item.description: Why is this appearing in the corner of the screen? How can I remove the Windows preview?
item.dc:creator: Sashann

item.title: It is impossible to add the optional function in the latest "experimental version".
item.description: I'm experiencing an issue with the latest experimental build where I am unable to add optional features through the settings menu. Despite multiple attempts, the option to select and install additional features simply does not respond or appears to be broken, preventing me from customizing my...
item.dc:creator: Porterwer

item.title: Have any other people received emails inviting them to join the Windows Insider Panel?
item.description: I received an email inviting me to join the Windows Insider Panel, but I am unsure if this is legitimate or a scam. Has anyone else also received such an email, and if so, what has been your experience with it?
item.dc:creator: Aarongs2480

item.title: Regional Endpoints for Azure Container Registry Geo-Replication — Now in Public Preview
item.description: By Johnson Shi, Zoey (Zhuyu) Li, Huangli Wu What's new Regional endpoints for geo-replicated Azure Container Registries are now in public preview. See the feature's official MS Learn documentation. If you've been following since the private preview announcement, here's what changed: No feature flag...
item.dc:creator: johnsonshi_msft

item.title: Preview of multiparty analytics with Azure Confidential Clean Rooms
item.description: Today, we are excited to announce the preview of multiparty analytics feature of Azure Confidential Clean Rooms, a fully managed service that allows customers and their partners to securely analyze privacy-sensitive datasets from multiple parties. It uses confidential compute enabled Apache...
item.dc:creator: Deepak_JV

item.title: Graph in Fabric (Generally Available)
item.description: Graph in Fabric provides relationship‑first data modeling natively into Fabric, so context is explicitly modeled rather than inferred. As AI systems become more capable, their primary limitation is no longer data access but understanding how data is connected; something traditional, table‑based...
item.dc:creator: IgalAmster

item.title: Azure Monitor Health Model (Preview): What's New!
item.description: Azure Monitor Health Model is a modern observability capability that brings together telemetry, architecture, and business context of your workloads to generate health insights. It continuously aggregates signals across dependencies, producing a single, actionable health state which reduces alert...
item.dc:creator: shijain13

item.title: Pod CIDR Expansion Generally Available and IP Address Planning on Azure CNI Overlay
item.description: In networking with Azure CNI Overlay, the cluster-wide pod CIDR is logically partitioned into smaller “node” blocks where each node is assigned a fixed CIDR slice (/24) by Azure. This decouples pod networking from the VNet address space entirely because pods receive addresses from a private CIDR...
item.dc:creator: Sam_Foo

item.title: Copilot in web modeling (Preview)
item.description: Copilot in web modeling (Preview) in the Power BI service, is an AI-powered assistant helping you analyze and improve your semantic models using natural language so you can spend less time on manual edits.
item.dc:creator: jacindaeng

item.title: Power BI at Microsoft Build 2026: The Agentic Era of analytics
item.description: Microsoft Build 2026 brings the next generation of intelligent analytics to Power BI—where agents do the building, apps deliver insights everywhere, and the platform gets more powerful for every user.
item.dc:creator: mohammadali

item.title: Frameworks only matter when they force decisions
item.description: Frameworks mean nothing, until they change what gets built! In this article we discuss how Git-Ape turns architecture and governance into delivery controls on Azure because, if frameworks do not shape delivery decisions, they are just decoration. Cloud teams do not have a framework problem. They...
item.dc:creator: davidwright, Arnaud Lheureux, Suzanne Daniels

item.title: Hosted MCP Servers in Connector Namespace (Preview)
item.description: Imagine you've built an agent and you want to give it access to tools via MCP servers. Local servers won't work because your agent can't connect to them in production. Wouldn't it be great if you could quickly stand up secure, enterprise-ready remote MCP servers that your agent can use? This is...
item.dc:creator: lily-ma

item.title: Intune macOS ADE: support for minimum macOS version enforcement before Platform SSO registration
item.description: Hi everyone,I would like to ask whether Microsoft Intune has any supported method, roadmap, or recommended workaround for enforcing a minimum or target macOS version during Automated Device Enrollment before Setup Assistant continues.The scenario is macOS zero-touch deployment with Intune,...
item.dc:creator: KacperM

item.title: Fix with Copilot for failing Actions now in Pro, Pro+, and Max
item.description: When a GitHub Actions job fails, Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max subscribers can now ask Copilot cloud agent to fix it in one click. Click the Fix with Copilot button… The post Fix with Copilot for failing Actions now in Pro, Pro+, and Max appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Agent tasks REST API now available for Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max
item.description: Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max users can now programmatically start and track Copilot cloud agent tasks with the Agent tasks REST API, available in public preview. Copilot cloud agent works… The post Agent tasks REST API now available for Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Budget and usage management APIs now generally available
item.description: GitHub’s expanded billing APIs to programmatically manage budgets, track usage, and access cost center data are now generally available. Manage budgets via APIs You can now manage the full lifecycle… The post Budget and usage management APIs now generally available appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Updating the taxonomy of failure modes in agentic AI systems: What a year of red teaming taught us
item.description: A surge in real-world attacks against agentic AI systems is reshaping how we think about risk. Based on 12 months of red teaming, this update introduces seven new failure modes, from supply chain compromise to goal hijacking, and the practical mitigations teams need now. The post Updating the...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft AI Red Team

item.title: API access to billing usage reports now generally available
item.description: The REST API for enterprise administrators to request and download billing usage reports in .csv format is now generally available. With this new capability, the same billing reports that are… The post API access to billing usage reports now generally available appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Larger context windows and configurable reasoning levels for GitHub Copilot
item.description: GitHub Copilot now supports larger context windows and configurable reasoning levels to help you tackle deeper, more complex work. Leverage one-million-token context windows A one-million-token context window means users can… The post Larger context windows and configurable reasoning levels for...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft Defender for Cloud Customer Newsletter
item.description: What's new in Defender for Cloud? Defender for Cloud is now integrated into the Defender portal to bring together cloud security posture management and threat protection in a single experience. Read more about it here. Cloud security reporting in the Defender portal is now in public preview...
item.dc:creator: Yura_Lee

item.title: Dataflow Gen2 and Power Query innovations at Microsoft Build: Low-code data transformation with standout scale, performance, and reuse
item.description: This week at Microsoft Build, we are announcing a broad wave of innovation across Dataflow Gen2 and Power Query in Microsoft Fabric and Power BI. These announcements build on the momentum customers are seeing with Dataflow Gen2 to prepare, transform, and operationalize data at scale—and reflect...
item.dc:creator: miguel

item.title: Benchmarking Dataflow Gen2: Faster data transformation at lower cost
item.description: The evolution of data transformation in Microsoft Fabric has reached a new milestone with Dataflow Gen2 (CI/CD). Recent benchmarks reveal not just incremental progress, but a leap forward—delivering order-of-magnitude improvements in both cost and performance compared to previous generations,...
item.dc:creator: miguel

item.title: Ignite 2025: What's new in Microsoft Defender?
item.description: This Ignite we are focused on giving security teams the edge they need to meet adversaries head on in the era of AI. The modern Security Operations Center (SOC) is undergoing a fundamental transformation, placing AI at the forefront of innovation - not just as an added feature, but as a driving...
item.dc:creator: Caroline_Lee
